ficar bom (de saúde).reason: cuidado claim is incoherent: '⚠️ No es "ponerse bien" en sentido moral' misattributes a 'moral sense' ambiguity to the Spanish phrase 'ponerse bien', which in Spanish is itself the standard way to say 'to get better/recover (health)' and carries no moral connotation. The real ambiguity (recover health vs. become a good person) belongs to Portuguese 'ficar bom', not to the Spanish equivalent, so the cuidado misrepresents what Spanish 'ponerse bien' means.
